summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Udaipur Wildlife Sanctuary static website. Most functionality works well with excellent responsive design, but identified critical issues with menu overlay and FAQ toggle functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Hamburger menu buttons (both header and hero) not opening menu overlay - 'active' class not being added
FAQ items not expanding when clicked - toggle functionality not working

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly at root URL with all sections visible
Header with logo displays correctly
Notice bar scrolling text is visible and working
Hero section with background image, title, ticket boxes renders properly
Boating section with 3 boat cards displays properly (Motor ₹100, Shikara ₹100, Paddle ₹50)
EV Cart section quantity controls work correctly (+ and - buttons functional)
All-in-One Booking section shows TOTAL: ₹0 (not NaN) and quantity buttons work
Attractions section shows 6 cards in proper grid
Bird Sanctuary, Wildlife, Eco Hut sections show side-by-side image+content layout
Location section with timing and map displays correctly
Facilities section with 6 cards in 2-column grid (mobile) / 3-column grid (desktop)
Gallery section with 4 images in 2x2 grid
Rules section displays properly
Quick Actions display in 3 columns
Footer with 3-column links layout
Entry ticket popup opens and closes properly
No horizontal overflow on any screen size
Desktop layout: 1200px max-width centered container working
Mobile layout: sections stack properly, 2-column grids for cards work perfectly
Responsive images with proper object-fit working
All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
Sub-pages load correctly: /pages/boating/booking.html, /pages/contact/contact.html
Boating booking page has functional quantity controls and form
Contact page displays contact information and contact form
EV Cart quantity controls work (tested ₹20 base price)
All-in-One Booking quantity controls update totals correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript functionality for menu overlay (hamburger menu not opening) and FAQ toggle (items not expanding when clicked). Both features have proper HTML structure and CSS but JavaScript event handlers are not working correctly.
